chief_complaint: A 22-year-old male presented with acute abdominal pain, fever, and altered mental status, with a history of poorly controlled hyperthyroidism.
history: The patient had a history of poorly controlled hyperthyroidism and presented with acute abdominal pain, fever, and altered mental status.
exam: Altered mental status, acute abdominal pain, fever
labs: Clinical scoring (Burch-Wartofsky Point Scale) and laboratory markers confirmed thyroid storm, imaging confirmed gastrointestinal perforation
correct_diagnosis: Thyroid storm complicated by gastrointestinal perforation
differentials: Thyroid storm complicated by gastrointestinal perforation
correct_ranking: Thyroid storm complicated by gastrointestinal perforation
